mapper.sql: id, level_name, min_points, max_points, discount, remark, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM member_level ORDER BY min_points ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_level (level_name, min_points, max_points, discount, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{levelName}, #{minPoints}, #{maxPoints}, #{discount}, #{remark}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE member_level SET level_name=#{levelName}, min_points=#{minPoints}, max_points=#{maxPoints}, discount=#{discount}, remark=#{remark} WHERE id=#{id}
